name: Suspicious Microsoft OneNote Child Process
notes:
This is rule detects suspicious Microsoft Onenote child process spawned.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Tim Rauch (Nextron Systems), Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems), Elastic (idea)
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Microsoft OneNote Child Process
SIGMA Description: Detects suspicious child processes of the Microsoft OneNote application. This may indicate an attempt to execute malicious embedded objects from a .one file.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'onenote.exe' ) AND ( ( LOWER("Filename") IN ('rundll32.exe','regsvr32.exe','bitsadmin.exe','certutil.exe','installutil.exe','schtasks.exe','wmic.exe','cscript.exe','wscript.exe','cmstp.exe','microsoft.workflow.compiler.exe','regasm.exe','regsvcs.exe','mshta.exe','msxsl.exe','ieexec.exe','cmd.exe','powershell.exe','hh.exe','javaw.exe','pcalua.exe','curl.exe','scriptrunner.exe','certoc.exe','workfolders.exe','odbcconf.exe','msiexec.exe','msdt.exe') AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('rundll32.exe','regsvr32.exe','bitsadmin.exe','certutil.exe','installutil.exe','schtasks.exe','wmic.exe','cscript.exe','wscript.exe','cmstp.exe','microsoft.workflow.compiler.exe','regasm.exe','regsvcs.exe','mshta.exe','msxsl.exe','ieexec.exe','cmd.exe','powershell.exe','hh.exe','javaw.exe','pcalua.exe','curl.exe','scriptrunner.exe','certoc.exe','workfolders.exe','odbcconf.exe','msiexec.exe','msdt.exe') ) OR ( LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'explorer.exe' AND ( LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.hta%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vb%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.wsh%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.js%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ps%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.scr%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pif%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bat%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cmd%' ) ) OR ( LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\users\public\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\programdata\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\tasks\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\temp\%' OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\tasks\%' ) ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Microsoft OneNote Child Process on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Parent Process Full Full Name") == 'onenote.exe' ) AND  ( 	 	( 		LOWER("Filename") IN ('rundll32.exe','regsvr32.exe','bitsadmin.exe','certutil.exe','installutil.exe','schtasks.exe','wmic.exe','cscript.exe','wscript.exe','cmstp.exe','microsoft.workflow.compiler.exe','regasm.exe','regsvcs.exe','mshta.exe','msxsl.exe','ieexec.exe','cmd.exe','powershell.exe','hh.exe','javaw.exe','pcalua.exe','curl.exe','scriptrunner.exe','certoc.exe','workfolders.exe','odbcconf.exe','msiexec.exe','msdt.exe') 		AND LOWER("Process Full Full Name") IN ('rundll32.exe','regsvr32.exe','bitsadmin.exe','certutil.exe','installutil.exe','schtasks.exe','wmic.exe','cscript.exe','wscript.exe','cmstp.exe','microsoft.workflow.compiler.exe','regasm.exe','regsvcs.exe','mshta.exe','msxsl.exe','ieexec.exe','cmd.exe','powershell.exe','hh.exe','javaw.exe','pcalua.exe','curl.exe','scriptrunner.exe','certoc.exe','workfolders.exe','odbcconf.exe','msiexec.exe','msdt.exe') 	) 	OR  	( 		LOWER("Process Full Full Name") == 'explorer.exe' 		AND 		( 			LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.hta%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.vb%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.wsh%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.js%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.ps%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.scr%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.pif%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.bat%' 			OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%.cmd%' 		) 	) 	OR 	( 		LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\appdata\%' 		OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\users\public\%' 		OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\programdata\%' 		OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\tasks\%' 		OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\temp\%' 		OR LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE '%\windows\system32\tasks\%' 	) ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Microsoft OneNote Child Process
Event description: Detects suspicious Microsoft Onenote child process spawned.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
